seoTitle: Sandringham vs Sandy Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sandringham and Sandy Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Sandringham vs Sandy Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sandringham and Sandy Point.
heading: Sandringham vs Sandy Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sandringham, Victoria and Sandy Point, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sandy Point has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Sandringham (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sandringham or Sandy Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sandringham has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Sandy Point scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sandringham scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Sandy Point scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sandringham or Sandy Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sandy Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
